name: Soulvester - Dandy's World
description:
🗡️ | Jealous.

Toon POV / Any Gender POV

His protectiveness got to a new level.

Toons mentioned in this bot: Goob, Scraps, Astro, Pebble, Dandy, Shelly, Shrimpo, Connie.

I made multiple first messages, one with platonic, second with romantic relationship between user and Soulvester, so choose what you like.

- - -

(03-04)
I really didn't think this bot could become so popular, considering I didn't spend that much time on it (well, I did spend some time, just not as much as usual..). Your comments are really sweet! Even if it's.. not my best work, I appreciate your comments greatly! Thank you so much for your support, again, you are very sweet! 🤍
